description_long: This coatrack features a classic, symmetrical design with two vertical posts connected by two horizontal bars. The posts are adorned with rounded finials at the top and have a series of ornamental bulges and tapers along their length, giving the structure a traditional, decorative appearance. The feet of the coatrack are splayed outward, providing stability and a touch of elegance. The entire object appears to be constructed from a dark, metallic material, likely wrought iron or steel, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. There are no visible hooks or additional attachments for hanging items, suggesting a minimalist approach. The overall form is sturdy and functional, suitable for placement in entryways, lobbies, or urban waiting areas.
description: A dark, metal coatrack with two ornate vertical posts, horizontal bars, and splayed feet, featuring a traditional, decorative style.
description_view_0: Front view showing both vertical posts, horizontal bars, and the symmetrical decorative details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of a single post with its ornamental bulges and the rounded finial at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same structural and decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the profile of the other post and its decorative elements.
attribute_decorative_elements: ornamental bulges and tapers on posts
